user.title: Connect to Fluidra
user.description: Sign in with your Fluidra account. All supported pool equipment on the account will be added.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Fluidra API.
error.no_supported_device: No supported Fluidra device was found on this account.

abort.already_configured: This Fluidra account is already configured.

init.title: Options
init.description: WebSocket push stays enabled. REST polling is only a conservative fallback.
